codeReview.summary: Solid implementation that fulfills all seven expected behaviors. The commit adds inline tool activity entries to the transcript, classifies tool results into complete/no_results/error statuses, properly handles the error case for both top-level and inline state, deletes the legacy WalkthroughModal.tsx, and adds two focused backend tests. The types are clean and the code follows project conventions (nullish coalescing, no eslint-disable, absolute imports). One non-blocking gap: the interrupted handler resets top-level toolActivity but does not update inline tool_activity entries in the transcript, leaving a stuck spinner if the user interrupts during an in-flight grounding search. The error handler correctly updates both.

issues.description: The 'interrupted' case resets top-level toolActivity to idle when status is 'searching', but does not update the corresponding inline tool_activity entry in the transcript list (unlike the 'error' case at line 393 which does update both). If a user interrupts mid-grounding-search, the inline entry will remain stuck as 'searching' with a spinning loader in the transcript forever. Should mirror the error handler pattern: scan transcript backwards and update the last 'searching' tool_activity entry to an appropriate terminal status (e.g. 'complete' or a new 'cancelled' status).

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md still lists 'frontend/src/components/WalkthroughModal.tsx: walkthrough voice modal' as an important entry point, but this file was deleted in this commit. The stale reference could mislead future workers into looking for a file that no longer exists.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 52 references WalkthroughModal.tsx; git show 6247dee confirms file deletion.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill (SKILL.md) lists 'frontend/src/components/WalkthroughModal.tsx' in step 1.2 as a file to trace before editing, and the frontend-worker skill does the same. Both skills now point to a deleted file. The skill procedure should be updated to point to the new walkthrough component paths (e.g. WalkthroughTranscript.tsx and the walkthrough shell components).

The .factory/library/frontend-knowledge.md and .factory/library/architecture.md both list WalkthroughModal.tsx as a relevant walkthrough file. These mission knowledge files are stale after the deletion and could confuse workers on subsequent features.

summary: Pass. The implementation correctly wires inline tool activity into the transcript, adds no_results classification, handles error events for inline entries, deletes the legacy WalkthroughModal.tsx, and adds backend test coverage. One non-blocking issue: the interrupted handler doesn't update inline tool_activity transcript entries (only the error handler does), which could leave a stuck spinner in the transcript if a user interrupts during grounding search. Three shared state observations flagged: AGENTS.md, two worker skills, and two library files still reference the deleted WalkthroughModal.tsx.
